nasb.text: He wrote on the tablets, like the former writing, the Ten Commandments which the Lord had spoken to you on the mountain from the midst of the fire on the day of the assembly; and the Lord gave them to me.

esv.text: And he wrote on the tablets, in the same writing as before, the Ten Commandments  that the Lord had spoken to you on the mountain out of the midst of the fire on the day of the assembly. And the Lord gave them to me.

cnv.text: 耶和華把先前所寫的，就是在集會的日子，在山上從火中告訴你們的十誡，都寫在這兩塊版上；耶和華把石版交給了我。

ccb.text: 耶和华把你们在山脚下聚会时祂在山上的火焰中向你们颁布的十条诫命，重新刻在石版上，并把石版交给我。
